prevalence.trend: increasing recognition among students and urban youth

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; may present with somatic complaints

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; psychotherapy access limited

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often underrecognized; clinical diagnosis in tertiary centers and some primary care programs
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT and SSRIs; counseling and lifestyle approaches (yoga/meditation) commonly used as adjuncts
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable generic SSRIs and growing tele-mental health capacity
